name: NFI Group Inc.
description: NFI Group Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of buses and motorcoaches and a provider of comprehensive aftermarket parts and service solutions. The company is a pioneer in the industry, offering propulsion-agnostic platforms, holistic support, and the broadest aftermarket offering in the market. Committed to best-in-class safety and innovation, NFI is actively leading the global evolution toward zero-emission mobility through its diverse portfolio of battery-electric and fuel cell-electric transit vehicles. Headquartered in Winnipeg, Manitoba, NFI operates across multiple countries, delivering sustainable transportation solutions to transit agencies and private operators worldwide.
